visual_style: Mix of Stripe (premium, colored, modern blue) and Linear (minimal, tech, precise)

component_guidelines.navbar: Sticky crystal glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/70, border-b border-gray-200/50). Must include Language Switcher (FR/EN) and primary CTA 'Join the Beta'.
component_guidelines.hero: Outcome-driven headline (Cabinet Grotesk text-5xl to text-7xl, tracking-tight). Subtitle explaining the problem. Single primary CTA. Background with subtle Stripe-like mesh gradient or glowing blue radial gradient. No heavy illustrations, prepare for the live UI demo below.
component_guidelines.interactive_search: A section titled 'Your client calls...'. Large, centered, beautiful input field mimicking Raycast or Spotlight. Framer Motion typing effect typing 'Didier Martin'.
component_guidelines.dashboard_mockup: Appears after typing 'Didier Martin'. Looks like a real SaaS interface (Linear/Notion vibes). Flat solid cards, 1px border (#E5E7EB), subtle shadow-sm. Tabs: AI Summary, Emails, Quotes, Invoices, Google Drive docs, Notion notes, Photos. Use the bento grid protocol for the internal layout.
component_guidelines.features_bento: Bento grid layout (Mode A). Cards with hover effects (The 'Tracing Beam' or subtle lift). Focus on Gmail, Drive, and Notion integrations.
component_guidelines.how_it_works: 3 clean steps layout. Split layout (Text on left, UI visual on right) or a vertical timeline with crisp connecting lines.
component_guidelines.pricing: 3 tiers (Solo 19€, Pro 49€, Team 99€). Use 'Grid Borders' or 'Tracing Beam' on the Pro tier to highlight it. Transparent pricing, no hidden fees.
component_guidelines.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary: Solid brand color (#4F46E5) with subtle hover lift and shadow. Secondary: Outline or ghost with gray text.
component_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

animation_strategy.hero: Fade up and staggered text reveal.
animation_strategy.search_bar: Typing effect using Framer Motion (use-motion-value and animate).
animation_strategy.dashboard_reveal: Scale up and fade in after search completes.
animation_strategy.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Scroll-triggered fade-ins for bento boxes.

image_urls.description: Mature French artisan smiling. Use as Didier Martin's avatar in the dashboard mockup.
Woodworker shaping wood. Use inside the 'Photos' tab of the dashboard.
Person cutting a piece of wood. Use inside the 'Photos' tab of the dashboard.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react for UI icons (search, mail, file-text, image, check). For specific brand logos like Gmail, Google Drive, and Notion, use react-icons (e.g., SiGmail, SiGoogledrive, SiNotion). Provide installation command: yarn add react-icons

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the theme and archetype strictly. MemoryHub must feel like a premium tool, mimicking Stripe's typography and Linear's minimal container borders.
Create a bilingual context or simple state to toggle FR/EN strings on the landing page.
Implement the interactive search demo carefully using Framer Motion. The text 'Didier Martin' should type out, and then trigger the display of the Dashboard mockup.

Dashboard Mockup: Do not build a separate page. It should be a visually stunning component built right into the landing page, showing realistic data for Didier Martin, including his avatar and work photos from the media section.
Use Shadcn UI for Tabs, Accordion, Buttons, and Cards. Customise their padding and borders according to the 'layout_and_spacing' guidelines.
Always add 'data-testid' to actionable items (Language switcher, CTA buttons, Tabs).
Do NOT use 'Inter' font for headings; stick to Cabinet Grotesk (or similar geometric/display sans).
Never use pure black or pure gray. Use the provided tinted colors.
Ensure 'Join the Beta' buttons stand out with the primary brand color.
Install the required packages before usage, like framer-motion, lucide-react, react-icons.
